moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Rashid's main combo tool

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Decent poke tool that's fully cancelable

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Has slightly higher hitstun than Rashid's other light attacks, making this the only light that can naturally combo into LK Eagle Spike (QCB+LK) | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Mostly a combo tool (links into stand MP) | Decent poke that combos into itself on Counter-Hit

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Combo / Juggle tool with surprisingly far range | Launches airborne opponents into a limited juggle state (launches grounded opponents as well on Punish Counter and pulls the opponent towards Rashid for easier follow-ups)

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Rashid's main frametrap / oki / combo tool as well as being a decent anti-air on frames 7-9 | Cannot hit cross-up (behind Rashid)

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Decent poke / punish tool that's cancelable into all Super Arts and combos into stand HP on Punish Counter (if close enough to the opponent) | A lot of pushback on hit and block

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into stand LP / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Standard crouch MK with a bit short range | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Has some Juggle potential naturally without Drive Rush | Has fixed framedata on block (always -11 on block even with meaty timing) with +4F extra recovery frames (28F)

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Cancelable into Arabian Skyhigh (QCB+K) during forward jump

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: First hit puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Second hit spikes down airborne opponents

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Furthest horizontal range of Rashid's jump attacks

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Shifts the normal jumping hurtbox upward during start-up (helps with avoiding some attacks)

moves.name: Blitz Strike
moves.notes: Rashid bounces forward off the opponent on hit and block giving him access to all his airborne moves again (except for another Blitz Strike / d+HP) on frames 12-23 | Rashid is in a forced knockdown state after he bounces off the opponent on hit or block

moves.name: Aerial Shot
moves.notes: Good air-to-air tool | Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Run
moves.notes: Rashid starts running forward if he holds forward after inputting his forward dash | Cancelable into a Low/High follow-ups on frames 18-72 (first 18F being the regular forward dash)

moves.name: Backup
moves.notes: Upper body Projectile invincible on frames 1-19 | Crouching state for the entire duration

moves.name: Tempest Moon
moves.notes: Not an Overhead | Airborne on frames 6-21 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: Tempest Moon (wind)
moves.notes: Not an Overhead | Airborne on frames 21-36 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: Flapping Spin
moves.notes: Only first his is fully cancelable | First hit puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state (second hit air resets)

moves.name: Beak Assault
moves.notes: Overhead with very far range | Not actually airborne

moves.name: Crescent Kick
moves.notes: Low crushes on frames 7-19 (but not actually airborne) | Great tool against low attacks as it combos into MP on Punish Counter

moves.name: Rising Kick
moves.notes: Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit | Fully cancelable on hit and block

moves.name: Side Flip
moves.notes: Rashid flips forward with no collision boxes on frames 8-23 allowing him to flip through opponents | Rashid can follow-up the flip with 3 different jump trajectories on frames 19-25

moves.name: Front Flip
moves.notes: Trajectory of the jump depends on which direction is held while inputting KK | Back: Short jump trajectory

moves.name: Wall Jump
moves.notes: Forced Knockdown and Counter-Hit state for the entire duration of the jump | Can be performed after any jump direction as long as the wall is in range

moves.name: Riding Glider
moves.notes: Throw Loop: hold Run briefly, then stop for a manually timed strike/throw mixup (does not work on mid-screen back rolls) | Throw Loop has a 3F timing window (4F on Blanka / E. Honda / Zangief)

moves.name: Sunset Drop
moves.notes: Throw Oki: Can Drive Rush into a meaty strike | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Desert Slider
moves.notes: Throw Oki (corner only): Drive Rush oki | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Eagle Edge
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Eagle Slash
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: LP Spinning Mixer
moves.notes: Great pressure / bully / punish tool that also blows through armor attempts with its 3 hits | Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to all hits (can combo after on Counter-Hit and Punish Counter)

moves.name: LP Spinning Mixer (Wind)
moves.notes: Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to all hits | Only first hit is cancelable into Super Art 3

moves.name: MP Spinning Mixer
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 6-10 | Airborne on frames 13-60 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: MP Spinning Mixer (Wind)
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 3-11 | Airborne on frames 9-96 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HP Spinning Mixer
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 6-12 | Throw invincible on frames 8-10

moves.name: HP Spinning Mixer (Wind)
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 5-11 | Throw invincible on frames 7-9

moves.name: OD Spinning Mixer
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8 and also invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-13 | Airborne on frames 10-86 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Spinning Mixer (Wind)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-6 | Airborne on frames 8-95 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: LK Eagle Spike
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 9-38 (Forced Knockdown state) | Landing recovery frames are cancelable into SA3 on HIT only

moves.name: LK Eagle Spike (Wind)
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 8-37 (Forced Knockdown state) | Landing recovery frames are cancelable into SA3 on HIT only

moves.name: MK Eagle Spike
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 12-38 (Forced Knockdown state) | Puts opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: MK Eagle Spike (Wind)
moves.notes: MK and HK Eagle Spike (wind enhanced) function exactly the same | Airborne on frames 8-36 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HK Eagle Spike
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 15-44 (Forced Knockdown state) | Puts opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: HK Eagle Spike (Wind)
moves.notes: MK and HK Eagle Spike (wind enhanced) function exactly the same | Airborne on frames 8-36 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Eagle Spike
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 12-40 (Forced Knockdown state) | Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: OD Eagle Spike (Wind)
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 7-37 | Airborne on frames 9-37 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: Whirlwind Shot
moves.notes: 1-hit projectile | Can hold the kick button to charge up the projectile

moves.name: Whirlwind Shot (lvl 2)
moves.notes: 2-hit projectile | Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits

moves.name: Whirlwind Shot (lvl 3)
moves.notes: 3-hit projectile | Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to all hits

moves.name: OD Whirlwind Shot
moves.notes: 2-hit OD projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.03 on frames 1-2 accelerating up to 0.09 on frames 3 and onward

moves.name: OD Whirlwind Shot (Hold)
moves.notes: 3-hit OD projectile | Projectile Speed: 0.03 on frames 1-2 accelerating up to 0.09 on frames 3 and onward

moves.name: LP Arabian Cyclone
moves.notes: Initial strike hitbox that spawns a stationary mini tornado afterwards (the tornado is a strike but has 1-hit of projectile durability) | Extended kicking leg is projectile invincible on frames 15-17

moves.name: MP Arabian Cyclone
moves.notes: Initial strike hitbox that spawns a stationary mini tornado afterwards (the tornado is a strike but has 1-hit of projectile durability) | Extended kicking leg is projectile invincible on frames 20-22

moves.name: HP Arabian Cyclone
moves.notes: Initial strike hitbox that spawns a stationary mini tornado afterwards (the tornado is a strike but has 2-hits of projectile durability) | Final active frame (frame 15) on the 2-hit mini tornado only applies 1 hit instead of 2, resulting in worse meaty frame advantage potential (+4 oH / +4 oB)

moves.name: OD Arabian Cyclone
moves.notes: Initial strike hitbox that spawns a stationary mini tornado afterwards (the tornado is a strike but has 1-hit of OD projectile durability) | Extended kicking leg is projectile invincible on frames 20-22

moves.name: Wing Stroke
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 22-61 (Forced Knockdown state) | Cancelable into air normals / specials on frames 32-51

moves.name: Rolling Assault
moves.notes: Upper body projectile invincible on frames 5-30 | Crouching state on frames 6-33

moves.name: Nail Assault
moves.notes: Upper body projectile invincile on frames 1-19 | Crouching state for the entire duration

moves.name: LK Arabian Skyhigh
moves.notes: Lower leg is projectile invincible on frames 1-21 | 3F landing recovery

moves.name: MK Arabian Skyhigh
moves.notes: Lower leg is projectile invincible on frames 1-26 | 3F landing recovery

moves.name: HK Arabian Skyhigh
moves.notes: Lower leg is projectile invincible on frames 1-29 | 3F landing recovery

moves.name: OD Arabian Skyhigh
moves.notes: Lower leg is projectile invincible on frames 1-21 | 3F landing recovery

moves.name: Super Rashid Kick
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-15 | Airborne on frames 9-35

moves.name: Ysaar
moves.notes: No form of invincibility whatsoever | 5-hit Super projectile

moves.name: Altair
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-15 | Armor Break

moves.name: Altair (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-15 | Critical Art does +500 extra damage over regular version
